governance.permitted_use: Research and benchmarking; private use only.
governance.redistribution_rights: Official ECOSTRESS page requests citation and states copyright/all rights reserved; converted matrices are private/internal until redistribution rights are clarified.

diagnostics.interpretation: Rupture aux jonctions de détecteurs, calibration locale ou sonde différente.
diagnostics.label: Splice / raccord détecteurs

diagnostics.interpretation: Décalage systématique entre campagnes, instruments ou référence blanche.
diagnostics.label: Erreur calibration / référence blanche

diagnostics.interpretation: Effet systématique du support, blanc/noir, transflectance ou environnement de mesure.
diagnostics.label: Fond différent

diagnostics.interpretation: Artefacts numériques ou traitement spectral incorrect.
diagnostics.label: Erreur interpolation / rééchantillonnage

diagnostics.interpretation: Combinaison possible changement de sonde + splice, amplifiée par géométrie, fond ou calibration.
diagnostics.label: Signature VERA25-like

diagnostics.interpretation: Modification de l'illumination, collecte, angle ou distance sonde-échantillon.
diagnostics.label: Différence de sonde / géométrie

diagnostics.interpretation: Couverture partielle du spot; contribution du fond ou du support.
diagnostics.label: Mélange feuille + fond

top_classes.name: Very dark grayish brown loamy sand
Very dark grayish brown silty loam
Kit Carson Co., Co. via USDA Soil Conservation service.
Kern Co., Ca., China Lake. via USDA Soil Conservation service.
Inyo Co., Ca., (Wild Horse Mesa) via USDA Soil Conservationservice.
San Bernadino Co., Ca. China Lake via USDA Soil Conservationservice.

The parent material is alluvium material over eolian. Light yellowish brown loamy sand, (sandy, mixed, thermic typic camborthid). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.aridisol.camborthid.coarse.89P1772.spectrum.txt

The parent material is alluvium from fan terrace. Brown gravelly sandy loam, (fine-loamy, mixed, mesic Xerollic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.aridisol.haplargid.coarse.89P1793.spectrum.txt

The parent material is alluvium over lacustrine material from playa. Light yellowish brown clay, (fine-loamy, mixed calcareous, thermic typic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.aridisol.salorthid.coarse.89P1763.spectrum.txt

The parent material is eolian from sandstone material from a sandhill ridge. Very dark grayish brown loamy sand, (sandy, mixed, mesic,ustic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.aridisol.torripsamment.coarse.90P0142.spectrum.txt

The parent material is loess from uplands. Very dark grayish brown silty loam, (fine-silty, mixed, mesic pachic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.mollisol.argiustoll.coarse.90P128s.spectrum.txt

The parent material is eolian from upland plains. Very dark grayish brown loam, (fine, montmorillonitic, mesic aridic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.mollisol.paleustoll.coarse.90P186s.spectrum.txt
Meerdink et al. 2019, Baldridge et al. 2009
